calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2012 Set For Trial On Jun-04-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Continued To Mar-02-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lewis Gillian #12355.

Plaintiff James A. Thompson, Esq. present.
Robert Boland, Esq. for and with Co-Defendant Julie Trueblood.
Default has been entered against the Defendant Daniel Rosen.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant Daniel Rosen for Judgment and Order fro distrubution of funds held by Interpleder.
Pursuant to the stipulation by the parties in open court, Co-Defendant Julie Trueblood's answer shall be deemed fully performed and to be judicially terminated and no longer enforceable between the parties.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Continued To Jan-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
